title: Effect of Sowing Date on the Incidence of Botrytis Gray Mold in Chickpea
abstract: Each of 3 genotypes were sown on 5 dates. Infection by B. cinerea in cv. Dhanush was significantly lower than in ICCV1 (Sita) and ICCL82108. Sowing dates also showed significant differences in infection intensity and when compared with a given sowing date each subsequent date reduced grey mould significantly. There was a significant interaction of genotypes with sowing dates.
